# haven — Security Policy

Thank you for helping keep haven secure. Please do not open public issue trackers for security vulnerabilities.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Prefer private reports via GitHub's Security Advisories for this repository:

- Email: webmaster at huybrechts dot xyz

When reporting, include:

- Affected version(s)
- A clear summary of the issue
- Steps to reproduce or a minimal proof-of-concept
- Impact and any suggested mitigations

We will acknowledge receipt within 10 business days and provide an estimated timeline for remediation.

## Supported Versions

This is a personal infrastructure project with a single production deployment. Security fixes are applied to the current `main` branch.

## Coordinated Disclosure

We follow responsible disclosure practices. Please give us reasonable time to investigate and fix the issue before public disclosure. We will coordinate on timing of advisories and CVE requests where applicable.

## After Reporting

Once a fix is available, we will:

- Publish an advisory (if appropriate) and notify the reporter
- Backport fixes to supported releases where feasible
- Provide mitigation guidance if immediate fixes are not available

## Legal

We ask reporters to avoid destructive testing and to follow applicable laws. We will not pursue legal action against good-faith security researchers following this policy.

Thank you for helping keep haven secure.
